source: https://www.travellerdeclaration.govt.nz/privacy/border-agencies-collecting-information/ and https://www.travellerdeclaration.govt.nz/completing-your-declaration/, plus https://www.customs.govt.nz/media/vuyeg3sf/customs-arrival-information-rules-2024.pdf (official NZTD field inventory, completion guidance, and prescribed information under the current Customs (Arrival Information) Rules 2024); re-checked 2026-07-14. The live form does not publish general web regexes, name or passport-number length limits, or a fixed typed date format. This local checker therefore uses broad passport and contact rules and ISO dates for consistency; these are local checks, not quoted government limits. Flight number is optional here because sea travellers receive vessel fields instead.

passport_number.label: Passport number
passport_number.help: Copy the number from the passport you will use to enter New Zealand. This checker uses a broad alphanumeric range because NZTD publishes no universal web length limit.

errors.tooShort: Enter the passport number printed on the photo page
errors.tooLong: Check the passport number — this local checker allows up to 20 characters
errors.invalidChars: Use letters and numbers only — no spaces or MRZ filler marks
errors.invalidFormat: Use the letters and numbers printed as the passport number

passport_expiry.label: Passport expiry date
passport_expiry.help: Match the expiry date on the passport used to enter New Zealand. This local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD; use the official form's date controls when submitting.

errors.tooEarly: Passport expiry date cannot be before 2026-07-14

family_name.label: Surname or family name
family_name.help: Use the English or Latin spelling shown in the passport you will use to enter New Zealand.

errors.required: Surname or family name is required
errors.tooShort: Enter the surname or family name shown on the passport
errors.invalidChars: Use the English or Latin passport spelling

given_names.label: Given name(s)
given_names.help: Enter every given name from the passport used to enter New Zealand. Do not drop a middle given name.

errors.required: Given name or names are required
errors.tooShort: Enter the given name or names shown on the passport
errors.invalidChars: Use the English or Latin passport spelling

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Match the passport date. This local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD; use the official form's date controls when submitting.

errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be after 2026-07-14

country_of_birth.label: Country of birth
country_of_birth.help: Use the country of birth requested by the NZTD. Answers in the declaration must be in English.

nationality.label: Nationality
nationality.help: Select the nationality shown on the passport you will use to enter New Zealand.

arrival_date.label: Arrival date in New Zealand
arrival_date.help: Use the date your flight or vessel reaches New Zealand, not the date it leaves the first country. This local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD.

arrival_method.label: Arriving by air or sea
arrival_method.help: Choose air or sea. The official form opens flight fields for air travel and vessel or port fields for sea travel.

errors.required: Choose whether you are arriving by air or sea

flight_number.label: Flight number
flight_number.help: Air travellers should enter the flight arriving in New Zealand. Sea travellers use the vessel and port fields instead. This checker accepts common airline-code and flight-number formats.

errors.invalidFormat: Use the airline code and flight number, for example NZ1 or SQ285

email.label: Email
email.help: Use an inbox you control. NZTD sends the reference number and submission information by email.

errors.tooLong: Email is too long — max 254 characters in this checker

phone.label: Contact phone number
phone.help: Include the country or region code for a number where you can be reached.

errors.invalidFormat: Include the country code and 7-15 digits

nz_address.label: Contact or residential address in New Zealand
nz_address.help: If you will stay at several places, enter the first New Zealand address. Use English.

errors.required: A New Zealand contact or residential address is required

travel_history.label: Countries visited in the last 30 days
travel_history.help: List every country outside New Zealand visited during the previous 30 days, including airport transit.

errors.required: Travel history for the last 30 days is required

immigration_status.label: Immigration status
immigration_status.help: Choose the official option that matches your passport, New Zealand visa or residence status, Australian passport or permanent residence, or visitor-visa-on-arrival situation.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the official status that matches your documents

restricted_items.label: Restricted goods, allowances, and cash
restricted_items.help: Answer every question about medicines, restricted goods, alcohol, tobacco, goods over the allowance, business goods, items carried for another person, and NZD $10,000 or more in cash or equivalent.

errors.required: Answer every restricted-goods and cash question
errors.invalidOption: Choose the truthful answer for each official question

biosecurity_items.label: Food, animal, plant, and outdoor items
biosecurity_items.help: Declare food, animal or plant products, soil or water, equipment used with animals or plants, used outdoor gear, and recent wilderness, animal, or farm contact. When unsure, declare it.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the truthful answer for each official question

declaration.label: Final declaration
declaration.help: Confirm only after checking that every answer is true, correct, and complete. Changes made later must be resubmitted before passport control.

errors.invalidOption: Confirm only after reviewing every answer
